rationale: Fresh source-only validation found TASK-100 mostly satisfies GC dry-run/archive-proof/restore-ledger semantics, Pi registration, skill enforcement, prompt assets, and session-handoff context-reset visible-result fix. However active unconsumed session handoffs are not protected: src/application/gc.ts collectRuntimeCandidates selects every file under .codewiki/runtime/session-handoffs, and a temp probe with a queued codewiki_session_handoff showed dry-run listed it and runtime purge deleted it. This violates TASK-100 acceptance: GC does not purge active unconsumed handoffs.
checks: Read source refs only: superseding implementation build, superseded implementation build, TASK-100 task, planning/documentation/feedback builds, touched source/tests/skills/docs
codewiki_audit profiles=[alignment,changed,task,stale-reference,file-structure] task_id=TASK-100: warning only for generated changed files; task/stale-reference/file-structure pass
npm run test:features: pass (19 passed, 0 failed)
One-off active queued handoff probe: dry-run candidates included .codewiki/runtime/session-handoffs/HANDOFF-QUEUED.json; purge deleted it; queuedExistsAfter=false

issues.summary: Active unconsumed handoff purge guard missing. collectRuntimeCandidates treats queued codewiki_session_handoff files as purgeable runtime artifacts, so runtime purge can delete a queued handoff before command-context consumption.

failed_criteria: TASK-100 acceptance: GC does not purge fail/block/current-policy/current-publication validation reports or active unconsumed handoffs.
GC-REQ-004: public source-owned GC path must support ignored runtime cleanup without manual deletion; runtime cleanup must not consume active handoff state.

isolation_requirement.reason: Implementation validation requires independent validator context and checked content proof.

audit_requirement.reason: Gateway profiles require deterministic audit evidence for their build or boundary context.

isolation.notes: Validator used source/build refs and deterministic checks only; builder chat was not used. Working tree dirty, so digest covers checked pre-commit content.
